levelList.name: Сила аурафарма
levelList.desc:
Внешние эффекты не могут вызвать повторное использование этого навыка  
Дополнительными целями становятся в первую очередь противники с <sprite name="GazeRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="GazeRyoshu">Взором</link></u></color> или <sprite name="ContemptRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="ContemptRyoshu">Презрением</link></u></color>  
- Наносит на 50% меньше урона дополнительным целям  
- Если цель только одна, наносит ей на 200% больше урона (в фокус. битвах за одну цель считается часть)  
[WhenUse] Сила монет +1 за каждые 4 единицы суммы силы <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration">Кетчупа</link></u></color> и <sprite name="Vibration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vibration">Тряски</link></u></color> на главной цели (до 2)  
[WhenUse] Наносит на (сумма силы <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration">Кетчупа</link></u></color> и <sprite name="Vibration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Vibration">тряски</link></u></color> на главной цели × 2)% больше урона (до 50%)  
[WhenUse] Наносит на (сумма <sprite name="GazeRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="GazeRyoshu">Взора</link></u></color> на всех целях × 7)% больше урона (до 49%)  
[EndSkill] <sprite name="GazeRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="GazeRyoshu">взор</link></u></color> и <sprite name="ContemptRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="ContemptRyoshu">Презрение</link></u></color> снимаются с целей, по которым попала атака

coindescs.desc: Если цель имеет <sprite name="ContemptRyoshu"><color=#e30000><u><link="ContemptRyoshu">Презрение</link></u></color>, наносит ей на 180% больше урона
[OnSucceedAttack] Наносит 3 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration">Кетчупа</link></u></color> и повышает его счётчик на 1

levelList.flavor:
"This indeed paves a new avenue in the field of space-rending techniques."
"Have you heard? One might think that rending the very fabric of space is the culmination of the Way of the Blade, but the path extends beyond that. Continue training, and one develops their own unique style of doing so. It adds another layer of artistry by leaving an unconventional touch to the universal technique, allowing for the rent to linger or, sometimes, even be reduced into the flash of an instant."
"It is somewhat of a point of pride for those who walk the Way of the Blade, meaning that it is also a frequent point of contention in the field. Fuhu, it is reminiscent of the days I used to engage in discourse of comparable belligerence with the other Maestros."

levelList.flavor:
"Taxidermied and immobilized does the foe lie in the trace the blade has rent in space."
"Such bladework is oft of utter keenness that its victims know not that they have been hewn; or even if they are somehow cognizant of the fact, they are affixed by a bladetrail that has seized the space they inhabit, only to bleed when the moment passes."
"Yet... the difference lies in how it cuts."
"The blade has indeed hewn but a singular trace, yet in sheathing it the wielder has conjured in their mind the multitude of slashes that have followed the same path—a most precise technique."
"Hm. Oft have I come across techniques such as that slash in the days following the incident, techniques that seem to contradict the very nature of causality."
